## Testing / 测试

<!-- 怎么测试的,跑过哪些场景 / How was it tested, what scenarios were exercised -->

- [ ] 单元测试通过 (`./scripts/build.sh :app:testDebugUnitTest`)
- [ ] 真机(或模拟器)上跑过改动的流程
- [ ] 没有引入新 warning / 错误

## Screenshots / 截图

<!-- 如果有 UI 改动,贴图 / For UI changes, attach screenshots -->

## Linked issues

<!-- 关联的 issue,Fixes #123, Closes #456 / Related issues -->

## Checklist

- [ ] 改了对应的单元测试(状态机相关)
- [ ] 没动 production behavior 没对应 issue / spec
- [ ] `README.md` 同步更新了(中英两边)
- [ ] commit message 描述 why
- [ ] 没引入 hardcoded secret
